task: Advanced high-value task: Construction Robotics Room Economic Impact Calculation. Scenario: a governance team wants a reproducible analysis that another reviewer can rerun from the row data alone for construction robotics room. Embedded packet: Records: R1 doorway_m=67 obstacle_count=105 floor_slope_pct=6; R2 doorway_m=76 obstacle_count=101 floor_slope_pct=9; R3 doorway_m=62 obstacle_count=116 floor_slope_pct=5. Remediation options: O1 changes doorway_m by -12% cost=89000; O2 changes obstacle_count by -18% cost=103800; O3 changes floor_slope_pct by -25% cost=62200; max_budget=129600. Rules and constraints: robot requires doorway>=0.85m, obstacles<=5, slope<=2%; missing values cannot be imputed and all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: quantify the operational consequence of each exception and rank follow-up actions by urgency and evidentiary strength. Deliver robotics_layout_4.xlsx + expert_memo.md with formulas, intermediate values, row-level citations, explicit assumptions, sensitivity checks, and a final recommendation table. Do not invent inputs; mark ambiguous items as needs_review.
